notes.body: #1910 Muncie, IN: Kenneth Smith, GM Store #1910, no longer employed with Estep & Company effective immediately. Direct all questions to Andrew Campbell (DM) or Brad Davis. Recognition: echoing Mia at St. Matthews (1704) for Value ENTHUSIASM.
Weekly GM/AGM call CANCELED this week. Hub tickets required for all outside vendor calls for tracking + warranty. Hannah Kaufman is new HR/Payroll team member. Swag contest open for shift leads.

OVERDUE tasks KY-2065: L-Rev (06/22 and 06/23 - two consecutive misses), VO-Rec-BOSS: Alpha Ohio Valley (06/22), VO-Rec-Performance Foodservice (06/23). Also: Weekly Sales WTD $7,352 vs LY $6,051 (+21.5%). FP% 25.3%.
5th Gear & Brand Updates Call today 10 AM EDT. Patty Press Jun 22: National Fry Day promo (mid-July) + July 4 bread delivery schedule adjustment - confirm 2065 bread order now.
